case_title: NIKOLAS PARAISO VS. YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUL-08-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-08-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-08-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT YELLOW CAB PRESENT. DEFENDANT ALADDIN SALAH NOT PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO ALADDIN MUNZER SALAH BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF AUG-08-2008 AT 3:30PM.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-08-2008 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PARAISO, NIKOLAS C/O LAW OFFICES OF PETSAS & STEPHENS, LLP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $160.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,160.00, DEFENDANT ALADDIN MUNZER SALAH DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, RETURNED, SENT TO ALADDIN MUNZER SALAH
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED NOV-03-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY PARAISO, NIKOLAS C/O LAW OFFICES OF PETSAS & STEPHENS, LLP AS TO DEFENDANT YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE SALAH, ALADDIN MUNZER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-08-2008 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
